import { FaceDetector, FilesetResolver } from "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mediapipe/tasks-vision@latest"; const video = document.getElementById("webcam"); const statusIndicator = document.getElementById("status-indicator"); const log = document.getElementById("log"); const startBtn = document.getElementById("startBtn"); let roster; let faceDetector; let isUserLooking = false; let recognition; let lastProcessedTime = 0; let lastCommandKey = ""; // Per memorizzare l'ultimo comando (es: "Rossi2") let isSpeaking = false; // Flag per capire se l'assistente sta parlando // 1. Inizializza Face Detector async function initFaceDetection() { const vision = await FilesetResolver.forVisionTasks("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mediapipe/tasks-vision@latest/wasm"); faceDetector = await FaceDetector.createFromOptions(vision, { baseOptions: { modelAssetPath: `https://storage.googleapis.com/mediapipe-models/face_detector/blaze_face_short_range/float16/1/blaze_face_short_range.tflite` }, runningMode: "VIDEO" }); startCamera(); } // 2. Avvia la Webcam async function startCamera() { const constraints = { video: { width: 320, height: 240 } }; const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia(constraints); video.srcObject = stream; video.addEventListener("loadeddata", predictWebcam); } // 3. Loop di rilevamento volto async function predictWebcam() { if (!faceDetector) return; const startTimeMs = performance.now(); const detections = faceDetector.detectForVideo(video, startTimeMs).detections; isUserLooking = detections.length > 0; if (isUserLooking) { statusIndicator.classList.add("active"); } else { statusIndicator.classList.remove("active"); } // Risparmio energetico: controllo ogni mezzo secondo setTimeout(() => { window.requestAnimationFrame(predictWebcam); }, 500); } const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)(); function playBeep(frequency, duration) { const oscillator = audioCtx.createOscillator(); const gainNode = audioCtx.createGain(); oscillator.type = "sine"; oscillator.frequency.value = frequency; oscillator.connect(gainNode); gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination); gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0.1, audioCtx.currentTime); gainNode.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.01, audioCtx.currentTime + duration); oscillator.start(); oscillator.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + duration); } // Beep acuto e breve (Successo) function beepSuccess() { playBeep(880, 0.2); // Nota LA5 } // Beep grave (Errore) function beepError() { playBeep(600, 0.2); // Nota LA3 playBeep(440, 0.2); // Nota LA3 } // 4. Configura Riconoscimento Vocale function initVoiceRecognition() { const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition; recognition = new SpeechRecognition(); recognition.lang = 'it-IT'; recognition.continuous = true; recognition.interimResults = false; recognition.onresult = (event) => { // SE L'ASSISTENTE STA PARLANDO, IGNORA TUTTO if (isSpeaking) { console.log("Ignorato: sto parlando io."); return; } const transcript = event.results[event.results.length - 1][0].transcript.trim().toLowerCase(); if (isUserLooking) { const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' }); // Log Giallo (Grezzo) const rawEntry = document.createElement("div"); rawEntry.style.padding = "2px 0"; rawEntry.style.color = "#ffff00"; rawEntry.innerHTML = `• ${time}: "${transcript}"`; log.prepend(rawEntry); processCommand(transcript); } }; recognition.onend = () => recognition.start(); recognition.start(); } // 5. Analisi del comando e Risposta vocale function ottieniNomiAmbigui(roster) { const conteggioNomi = {}; roster.forEach(p => { const nome = p.Nome.toLowerCase(); conteggioNomi[nome] = (conteggioNomi[nome] || 0) + 1; }); // Ritorna un array di nomi che appaiono più di una volta return Object.keys(conteggioNomi).filter(nome => conteggioNomi[nome] > 1); } // Funzione per calcolare la somiglianza (0 = identiche, più è alto più sono diverse) function levenshtein(a, b) { const tmp = []; for (let i = 0; i <= a.length; i++) tmp[i] = [i]; for (let j = 0; j <= b.length; j++) tmp[0][j] = j; for (let i = 1; i <= a.length; i++) { for (let j = 1; j <= b.length; j++) { tmp[i][j] = Math.min(tmp[i - 1][j] + 1, tmp[i][j - 1] + 1, tmp[i - 1][j - 1] + (a[i - 1] === b[j - 1] ? 0 : 1)); } } return tmp[a.length][b.length]; } function processCommand(text) { const now = Date.now(); const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' }); const isVoiceEnabled = document.getElementById("enableVoice").checked; const pointsMatch = text.match(/\b(1|2|3)\b/); if (!pointsMatch) return; const points = pointsMatch[0]; const voiceName = text.replace(points, "").replace(/punti|punto|pt/g, "").trim(); if (voiceName.length < 2) return; const nomiAmbigui = ottieniNomiAmbigui(roster); let bestMatch = null; let minDistance = 3; let matchedAnAmbiguousName = false; roster.forEach(p => { const cognome = p.Cognome.toLowerCase(); const nick = (p.NickName || "").toLowerCase(); const nome = p.Nome.toLowerCase(); if (nomiAmbigui.includes(nome)) { if (levenshtein(voiceName, nome) < minDistance) { matchedAnAmbiguousName = true; } } let varianti = [cognome, nick]; if (!nomiAmbigui.includes(nome)) varianti.push(nome); varianti.forEach(target => { if (!target) return; const dist = levenshtein(voiceName, target); if (dist < minDistance) { minDistance = dist; bestMatch = p; matchedAnAmbiguousName = false; } }); }); if (bestMatch) { const label = bestMatch.Cognome || bestMatch.NickName; const currentCommandKey = `${label.toLowerCase()}${points}`; // --- CONTROLLO 5 SECONDI: SOLO PER I MATCH RIUSCITI --- if (currentCommandKey === lastCommandKey && (now - lastProcessedTime) < 5000) { console.log("Comando duplicato bloccato per 5 secondi."); return; } // Se arriviamo qui, il comando è valido e non è un duplicato recente lastProcessedTime = now; lastCommandKey = currentCommandKey; const entry = document.createElement("div"); entry.style.padding = "2px 0"; entry.style.color = "#00ff00"; entry.innerHTML = `=> OK: ${label.toUpperCase()} ${points} pt`; log.prepend(entry); if (isVoiceEnabled) speakFeedback(`${label}, ${points}.`); else beepSuccess(); } else { // --- SE IL COMANDO FALLISCE: RESETTIAMO IL FILTRO --- // In questo modo, se ripeti la stessa cosa e stavolta viene riconosciuta, passerà subito. lastCommandKey = ""; lastProcessedTime = 0; const entry = document.createElement("div"); entry.style.padding = "2px 0"; entry.style.color = "#ff4444"; if (matchedAnAmbiguousName) { entry.innerHTML = `x "${voiceName}" NOME DUPLICATO (usa Cognome/Nick)`; } else { entry.innerHTML = `? Nessun match per "${voiceName}"`; } log.prepend(entry); if (!isVoiceEnabled) beepError(); } } function speakFeedback(message) { const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(message); utterance.lang = 'it-IT'; // Quando inizia a parlare, attiviamo il flag utterance.onstart = () => { isSpeaking = true; }; // Quando finisce, aspettiamo un piccolo margine (500ms) prima di riascoltare // per evitare l'eco residua nella stanza utterance.onend = () => { setTimeout(() => { isSpeaking = false; }, 500); }; window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance); } function readRoster() { const cacheRoster = localStorage.getItem("datiRoster"); if (cacheRoster ) { try { roster = JSON.parse(cacheRoster); } catch (e) { console.error("Errore parsing cache Roster", e); localStorage.removeItem("datiRoster"); } } } // Funzione per visualizzare il roster al centro function popolaRoster() { const container = document.getElementById("roster-list"); if (!roster || roster.length === 0) { container.innerHTML = "Roster vuoto."; return; } let html = '
GIOCATORI ATTIVI
'; roster.forEach(p => { html += `
${p.Cognome} ${p.Nome} ${p.NickName || '-'}
`; }); container.innerHTML = html; } // Avvio al click startBtn.addEventListener("click", () => { readRoster(); popolaRoster(); // Visualizza la lista al centro initFaceDetection(); initVoiceRecognition(); startBtn.style.display = "none"; speakFeedback("Pronto."); });
